full_response:
We want to remove every explicit occurrence of the metric from  

  A_{abc}\;g^{bd}\;S^{ce}\;g_{df}\;g^{h}{}_a .  

Throughout, repeated indices are summed over and we keep track of the index
positions (up/down).

----------------------------------------------------------------
1. Contract g^{bd} with g_{df}

 g^{bd} g_{df} = δ^{b}{}_f         (Kronecker delta, one index up, one down)

Hence  

 A_{abc}\;g^{bd}\;S^{ce}\;g_{df}\;g^{h}{}_a
 = A_{abc}\;δ^{b}{}_f\;S^{ce}\;g^{h}{}_a .

----------------------------------------------------------------
2. Use δ^{b}{}_f to replace the index b → f in A

 A_{abc} δ^{b}{}_f = A_{afc} .

Expression now:

 A_{afc}\;S^{ce}\;g^{h}{}_a .

----------------------------------------------------------------
3. Contract g^{h}{}_a with A_{afc}

 g^{h}{}_a = δ^{h}{}_a .

Therefore  

 A_{afc}\;S^{ce}\;g^{h}{}_a
 = A_{afc}\;S^{ce}\;δ^{h}{}_a
 = A_{hfc}\;S^{ce} .

----------------------------------------------------------------
4. Final result (no metrics left)

The completely simplified tensor is  

 A_{hfc}\,S^{ce} ,

with free indices h (lower), f (lower), and e (upper).

\boxed{A_{hfc}\,S^{ce}}

Confidence: 89%
